skills.noSkillsDesc: Installed plugin skills will appear here

artifacts.noArtifactsDesc: Files created or edited by the assistant will appear here

fileTree.selectFolder: Select a working folder to view files

fileTree.deleteConfirmRunning: This session is currently running. Stop it and delete?

fileTree.deleteRunningNotice: This session still has active work. The current run will be stopped before deletion.

plan.confirmExecuteDesc: This will start implementation in the current session.
plan.confirmExecuteInNewSessionTitle: Execute approved plan in a new session?

plan.rejectDesc: Explain why the plan should be revised.

plan.rejectedHint: Plan rejected. Provide feedback to revise.
